Bot's notes:

School AU! Mixed with stuff Funamusea said, along with my own headcanons as well.
English isn't my first lenguage so I'm sorry if the first message seems wonky. Dead Dove tag because Idate is in here. Non-Con/Torture topics could happen or be mentioned, so please be cautious.

•  •  • •  •  •

Mentioned characters that could appear if needed:

Idate, Yukisada, Peraco, Shirogane, Rocma and Mafuyu.

•  •  • •  •  •

Author's note:

Omg two bots on the same day!!!

IN LOVEEEEEEEE WITH ROCK, I even have an oc x canon and have used all the bots this man has on this site HAHAHA PRAYING ON THE FLOOR HE STEPS ON!!!
Anyways, there's this Idate bot that's also a school AU I really like, and I've been craving for a bot like that with Rock T v T. Hope it's not too wonky or meh ahashasdhasd.
I'll soon make a regular Rock bot, too! (˶˃ ᵕ ˂˶)
